zh.lifeSummary: 當Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay於1267年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯時，她的父親William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton17歲，母親Ada De Baliol21歲。她於大約1286年與Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1334年1月3日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay于1267年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯i斯时，她的父亲William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton17岁，母亲Ada De Baliol21岁。她于大约1286年与Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1334年1月3日在苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Christine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

variants.name: Christeen
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay was born in 1267, in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, was 17 and her mother, Ada De Baliol, was 21. She married Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy about 1286. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 January 1334, in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay est née en 1267, à Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Ada De Baliol, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy environ 1286. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 janvier 1334, à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay 1267 in Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton 17 und ihre Mutter Ada De Baliol 21. Sie hat um 1286 Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Januar 1334 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay è nata il nel 1267 nel Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Ada De Baliol, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy circa 1286. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 gennaio 1334, nel Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsayが1267年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父William de Lindsay - Lord of Lambertonは17歳，母Ada De Baliolは21歳であった。約1286年にEnguerrand V de Guînes-Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1334年1月3日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay(이)가 1267년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada De Baliol(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1286년 Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1334년 1월 3일 스컷랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Engl: Berwick-upon-Tweed, Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay nasceu em 1267, em Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Ada De Baliol, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy aproximadamente 1286. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de janeiro de 1334, em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay родилась в 1267 г. в местности гуiнесь, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada De Baliol, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy около 1286 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 января 1334 г. в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christine Chétienne of BAILLEUL de Lindsay nació en 1267, en Guînes, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Ada De Baliol, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Enguerrand V de Guînes-Coucy aproximadamente 1286. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de enero de 1334, en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años.
